title: PCB-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs for PCB Placement and Routing (ICLR 2026)
abstract: [PCB-Bench] Ever found yourself lost in circuit board design, wondering how to place components and route signals? This tool is like having a professional navigator by your side, streamlining PCB placement and routing. Give it a try and take the mystery out of your next circuit design project! 🚀
abstract_zh: 【PCB-Bench】你是不是也经常在电路板上迷路，不知道该把元件怎么排布？现在有了这个工具，就像请了个专业导航员，帮你轻松搞定芯片布局和走线！快来试试吧，让你的电路板设计从此不再迷茫。🎉
